name: Banana Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg, salt, mashed bananas, and peanut butter.
3. Stir in the uncooked rolled oats.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cut into 2 x 1 inch bars.
8. Makes about 4 dozen bars.
